# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Bash script for deploying to AWS using the AWS CLI. The script should authenticate with AWS and perform deployment operations. Ensure the script can be used safely in both local development and CI/CD environments.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

#!/bin/bash

set -euo pipefail

# Variables
AWS_PROFILE="your-aws-profile"
AWS_REGION="your-aws-region"
S3_BUCKET="your-s3-bucket"
DEPLOYMENT_PACKAGE="your-deployment-package.zip"
FUNCTION_NAME="your-lambda-function-name"

# Function to authenticate with AWS
authenticate() {
    if [[ -z "${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID:-}" || -z "${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY:-}" ]]; then
        echo "AWS credentials not set. Exiting."
        exit 1
    fi

    echo "Using AWS profile: $AWS_PROFILE"
    aws configure set aws_access_key_id "${AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID}"
    aws configure set aws_secret_access_key "${AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY}"
    aws configure set region "${AWS_REGION}"
}

# Function to package application
package_application() {
    echo "Packaging application..."
    zip -r "${DEPLOYMENT_PACKAGE}" .
}

# Function to upload package to S3
upload_package() {
    echo "Uploading package to S3..."
    aws s3 cp "${DEPLOYMENT_PACKAGE}" "s3://${S3_BUCKET}/"
}

# Function to deploy the Lambda function
deploy_function() {
    echo "Deploying Lambda function..."
    aws lambda update-function-code --function-name "${FUNCTION_NAME}" --s3-bucket "${S3_BUCKET}" --s3-key "${DEPLOYMENT_PACKAGE}"
}

# Main execution
authenticate
package_application
upload_package
deploy_function

echo "Deployment completed successfully."
